name: Ellington Credit Company
description: Ellington Credit Company is a closed-end management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company. The company primarily invests in corporate debt, including senior secured loans, second lien loans, and mezzanine debt, as well as other credit-related instruments. It is externally managed by Ellington Credit Company Management LLC, an affiliate of Ellington Management Group, L.L.C., a registered investment adviser with a long track record of investing in diverse credit markets.
